response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the VTuber as Nekomata Okayu and the event as her Birthday Festival 2026 via on-screen hashtag #猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026. 2. Detected the song 'ノンデリシャス' (Non-Delicious) and composer 'てにをは' (Teniwoha) from on-screen text at 00:26. 3. Attempted web search for official lyrics, which failed. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the performance in the video. 5. Divided the video into intro, performance, and outro scenes.
response.global_summary: Nekomata Okayu performs her song 'Non-Delicious' at her birthday festival in 2026. The video includes an introduction, the full musical performance, and an outro/credits sequence.

scenes.description: Introductory segment featuring Nekomata Okayu talking to the audience before the performance.
Nekomata Okayu performs the song 'Non-Delicious'. The song title and composer are displayed on-screen.
